note: 2018 cover used RibMon; missing from 2018 species_list but present in 2025 as Ribes montigenum.
2018 cover used RubIda; missing from 2018 species_list but present in 2025 as Rubus idaeus.
2018 cover used lowercase "engelmann"; species_list has "Engelmann" — case mismatch.
V. californicum and V. tenuipetalum are synonymized in the RMBL flora; the 2018 list explicitly notes *syn. = V. californicum var. californicum. Treat all Veratrum samples as V. tenuipetalum.
2018 list uses segregate Pentaphylloides floribunda; 2025 uses Dasiphora fruticosa (modern accepted). Synonyms per the 2018 species_list note: *syn. = Potentilla fruticosa, Dasiphora fruticosa.
2018 list uses segregate Psychrophila leptosepala; 2025 uses Caltha leptosepala (modern accepted). 2018 species_list explicitly preferred Caltha (*syn. = Caltha leptosepala).
New 2026 taxon (low-elevation plains pricklypear); not present in 2018/2025.
New 2026 taxon (soapweed yucca); not present in 2018/2025.
2026 cover misspelled "Pusatilla"; canonical Pulsatilla nuttalliana (= Anemone patens, pasqueflower).
Generic "Sedge" Named-Species token; resolved to genus Carex. needs_review — no species-level ID.
